remarks: Live in the heart of Stamford -75 Henry Street! This spacious 3-bedroom, 2-bath luxury residence offers the perfect combination of modern design, abundant natural light, and an ideal location. Featuring an open-concept layout, oversized windows, premium finishes, and a dedicated home office, this home is designed for both comfortable everyday living and working from home.  Just steps from the Stamford Transportation Center, you'll enjoy an easy commute to NYC via Metro-North or Amtrak. Minutes to Stamford's vibrant South End, Harbor Point, and downtown, where you'll find award-winning restaurants, lively bars, waterfront parks, coffee shops, fitness studios, shopping, and entertainment right outside your door.  Highlights:  Brand-new construction 3 spacious bedrooms 2 full bathrooms Dedicated home office/flex space Open-concept living with abundant natural light High-end finishes throughout Near Stamford Train Station Near Harbor Point, downtown restaurants, nightlife, and shopping Convenient access to I-95, Route 1 Convenient Storage in Basement Designated Parking
